Stitch Template • Consolidated Design BrainSAIT • Automation-first clinic growth layer

Unified Clinic Growth Command Center

Merged, consolidated, and enhanced custom design for all listed institutions with one strategic frame: reduce manual booking leaks, qualify leads automatically, and scale full-lifecycle bilingual patient journeys (Arabic/English).

Pillar 01

Booking Friction Control

High-volume scheduling orchestration for dental and medical branches.

Pillar 02

Lead Qualification Engine

Automated triage + authority content sequencing for derma/cosmetic demand.

Pillar 03

Lifecycle + Bilingual Expansion

Executive care lifecycle workflows with Arabic/English conversion continuity.

1) Dental & Medical Centers

Focus: Scheduling friction + manual booking leak closure
Institution Name Primary Specialty Website URL Contact Info Primary Location
Ram Clinics Dental & Medical ramclinics.com 920004567 Al-Sahafa / Al-Rawdah
Sigal Dental Clinic Premium Dentistry sigal.sa 0114831111 Al-Takhassusi St
Imtiaz Dental Center Specialized Dentistry imtiaz.com.sa 0114626633 Al-Olaya District
Avicena Dental Center Orthodontics / Implants avicena.com.sa 0112005577 King Fahd Road
Star Smiles Pediatric / Cosmetic starsmiles.com.sa 0114164433 Al-Sulaimaniyah

Leak Points to Eliminate

Missed callbacks, branch mis-routing, delayed confirmations, and no-show fallout in high-volume slots.

Stitch-Enhanced Booking Layer

Multi-branch slot routing, priority queueing, auto-confirmation journeys, and smart rebooking loops.

2) Dermatology & Cosmetic Surgery

Focus: Automated qualification + clinical authority content
Institution Name Primary Specialty Website URL Contact Info Primary Location

Qualification Intelligence

Intent scoring by treatment type, urgency, budget tier, and procedure readiness.

Authority Content Sequencing

Clinical pillar pages, outcome proof blocks, and doctor-trust storytelling mapped to lead stage.

3) Premium Polyclinics & Executive Health

Focus: Full-lifecycle automation + bilingual expansion
Institution Name Primary Specialty Website URL Contact Info Primary Location
Consulting Clinics Multi-Specialty consultingclinics.com 0114646330 Makkah Al-Mukarramah Rd
Dallah Health Multi-Specialty dallah-health.com 920012222 Al-Nakheel / Al-Namudajiyah
First Clinic Executive Health firstclinic.com.sa 0112222111 King Abdullah Rd
Specialized Medical Center Comprehensive Care smc.com.sa 0114343800 King Fahd Rd

Lifecycle Automation Stack

From first touch to post-visit retention: intake, reminders, follow-up pathways, and proactive recalls.

Bilingual Growth Motion

Arabic + English funnels, triage content, and patient messaging tailored to channel and specialty.

Merged Automation Blueprint

One consolidated command model built from the Stitch pattern: each segment keeps its own funnel intelligence while sharing a common orchestration backbone, analytics layer, and conversion governance.

Layer A

Acquisition Intake

Channel capture, source attribution, bilingual intent parsing, and branch-safe routing.

Layer B

Qualification & Scheduling

Lead scoring + smart sloting + confirmation workflows to close manual booking leaks.

Layer C

Retention & Expansion

Post-visit engagement, reactivation loops, and executive care upsell/cross-specialty pathways.

Customization Modules (Stitch-Based)

Smart Booking Orchestrator

Branch load balancing, queue prioritization, and one-click rebooking.

Clinical Lead Qualifier

Procedure-fit triage, readiness scoring, and consult acceleration.

Authority Content Grid

Doctor trust blocks, case narratives, and specialty pillar sequencing.

Bilingual Lifecycle Engine

EN/AR message orchestration across reminders, follow-up, and retention.
